_paytable_note: Uniformly scaled x0.8308 in the mechanics-diet pass (on top of x0.9603 free-spins, x0.4669 fat-tail and x0.6993 rare-but-big trims): funds the guaranteed free-spins chickens and the steeper top shot tier; golden chicken + cross-multiply were cut in the same pass. Measured 94.44% +/- 1.43 total RTP at 1M spins. Still PLACEHOLDER - final shaping later.

symbols._note: Wild = CHICKEN in the base game. A working wild shot or not (substitutes, helps form clusters); can be shot when in a winning cluster (see chicken_shot).

cascade._note: Tumble/avalanche. Winning clusters are removed, symbols fall, new ones fill from above; repeat. Base spins cap at max_base_steps; each step's cluster wins are multiplied by step_multipliers[level-1] (x1 early keeps common outcomes and hit rate untouched; the tail is where the money moved). PLACEHOLDER - TO BE BALANCED.

sticky_wilds._note: A winning wild stays pinned for the rest of the paid spin. Capped at 3 concurrent.

temporary_wilds._note: Later cascade steps may add one temporary wild before the win-check; never becomes sticky, never placed on an existing/sticky wild, gone after use.

chicken_shot._note: BASE GAME shot mechanic. A chicken (wild) is shot only when it is part of a WINNING CLUSTER: one shot_chance roll per clustered chicken; tier = last entry with min_fill <= meter fill entering the spin. A SHOT chicken buffs the WHOLE cluster (cluster win * buff value; several shot cells in one cluster SUM). A chicken not in a winning cluster, or in one but unshot, is a normal wild with no buff. ALL PLACEHOLDER - TO BE BALANCED.
chicken_shot._tier_note: TANGIBLE METER: the top tier is deliberately steep (30%) - a 2.5% vs 12.5% spread was statistically invisible over a session. A full-ish meter must be FELT.
chicken_shot._buff_note: RARE-BUT-BIG: shots are uncommon (~1 in 30 spins), so each is an event - big values, paytable trimmed to pay for them.
chicken_shot._golden_note: GOLDEN CHICKEN was CUT in the mechanics-diet pass: rare x rare (~1 in 10k+ spins) with a modest payoff - dream-budget spent without buying a dream. Its RTP went back into the base paytable.

free_spins._note: Rampage-freespins: when the meter tops out, the NEXT `count` spins are FREE - no bet, the board is topped up to `guaranteed_chickens` chickens (the climax must have targets), and every clustered chicken is shot (shot_chance 1.0). Free-spin buffs do NOT persist as badges (one payoff each). The meter is frozen during free spins. Replaces the old single-spin rampage AND the cork sniff.

persistent_buff._note: PERSIST-UNTIL-USED. A shot chicken's buff multiplies its birth cluster, then STAYS on its CELL (the cell holds a normal symbol next spin) as a waiting xN badge - however many spins it takes - until a winning cluster covers the cell again: that cluster is multiplied and the buff is CONSUMED. One buff = exactly two payoffs (enforced in scoring: a buffed cell multiplies only the FIRST cluster covering it per spin), so cost is bounded and the board cannot saturate. A fresh shot on a cell already holding a waiting buff SUMS, capped at max_value. PLACEHOLDER - TO BE BALANCED.
persistent_buff._ferment_note: FERMENTING: a waiting buff that survives ferment_interval spins grows by ferment_amount (again each interval), capped at max_value.
persistent_buff._cross_note: CROSS-MULTIPLY was CUT in the mechanics-diet pass: it fired too rarely to be perceived and its budget went back into the base paytable.

bottle._note: EVERY bottle contains alcohol - no empty bottles. A spawned bottle draws its type from BOTTLE_TYPES (weighted) and adds that type's `fill` to the meter; the meter's fill sets the chicken-shot tier. Topping METER_MAX queues FREE SPINS (see chicken_shot.free_spins) and the OVERFLOW CARRIES OVER (fill -= METER_MAX). FAT TAIL: the jug (half the meter) and the barrel (the WHOLE meter - instant trigger, theoretically on spin 1). LOW PITY: higher base chance + flatter dry-spin ramp keeps the same ~6.4-spin average gap (meter cycle ~60 paid spins) but with real hot streaks and dry spells. PLACEHOLDER fills/weights - TO BE BALANCED.

_drunk_mode_note: DRUNK MODE was fully REMOVED in the mechanics-diet pass (constants, math module, animator and spec block deleted). Recover from git history if it ever returns.
